---
title: BsParserOne
subtitle: "valid'em"
execute:
  echo: false
---

> Validate an bsInput with one super_bcv_wrapper

::: {#inputDiv}
<!-- inputDiv is considered Void-->
:::

```{ojs}
import { super_bcv_parser } from "./bsBcv.js";

superBCV = new super_bcv_parser() // instance of singleton parser

```




```{ojs}
import { bsInputgroupRoot } from "./bsui.js"

viewof refInput2 = new bsInputgroupRoot({
  prefixHTML: "<i class='bi bi-book'></i>",
  placeholder: "Enter Bible reference…",
  transform: superBCV.osis_array,     // <---- HERE
  fetcher: superBCV.fetchPassage,
  addLabel: "Add",
  resetLabel: "RAZ",
  clipLabel: "CLIP"
}).node()

refInput2.current   // "John.3.16"
//refInput.accum     // ["John.3.16", ...]
refInput2.content   // sanitized passage_html from your Worker

```
